moved_logic_domains.change: Removed broken placeholder symbols and switched preview controls to stable icon rendering.
Added optimistic local state updates and rollback for block/unblock and delete-for-all flows.
Hardened optimistic send rollback path for non-block and network failures.

dependency_changes.change: Now receives dmDialogs + dmThreadItems snapshots from useForumDmRuntime for rollback safety.

detected_risks: Rollback of optimistic dialog/message state can conflict with concurrent background refresh if multiple actions happen in parallel.
Dialog removal fallback relies on cached previous lastMessage for optimistic send rollback.
notes: Validation: pnpm build passed; only existing non-blocking no-img warnings remained.
